market_context: X/Twitter sentiment is mixed but leans bearish on tech after QQQ's -5.1% weekly drop and VIX spike to 20.61. Pre-market futures point to a flat open with limited major news catalysts; options flow shows elevated put activity on NVDA and TSLA.

predictions.reasoning: SPY closed at 735.89 after a -2.4% five-day slide; elevated VIX at 20.61 and continued QQQ weakness suggest further pressure into today's close per recent futures data.
Heavy put options flow noted on NVDA overnight alongside broader semis selloff; current price 205.40 likely tests lower support by EOD.
TSLA shows short interest signals and minor positive X mentions on EV demand; rebound from 393.50 expected in low-volume session.
BTC up 2.1% over five days with steady crypto sentiment on X; likely extends gains modestly into US close.
